notes: THE ONE MODEL: every criterion a fuzzy limitation in ONE aggregation — soils raw inputs (SQL proportions) + LiDAR slope (soils curve) + power incl. interconnection-queue wait + water incl. regional stress + fiber (long-haul hub distance) + land cost + hazard (seismic/tornado-hail/wildfire/karst) + climate; soils blockers + catastrophic site blockers, de-bimodal soft-max blend. Seismic prices, never kills (calibration-caught). Calibrated best-of-ring against 88 operating hyperscale campuses.
